name: report_sim_version
short_description: Report the list of correct SIM_VERSION attribute values for cell types in the target part
full_help:
report_sim_version

Description: 
Report the list of correct SIM_VERSION attribute values for cell types in the target part

Syntax: 
report_sim_version  [-part <arg>] [-file <arg>] [-append] [-return_string]
                    [-unisim <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-part]           Part
  [-file]           Output file
  [-append]         Append the results to file
  [-return_string]  Return report as string
  [-unisim]         Return the SIM_VERSION for the unisim if present
  [-quiet]          Quiet option
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Return the SIM_VERSION for the unisim if present
Suspend message limits during command execution
